90000.name: A Common Life
90000.description: You lived a long, ordinary life. No miracles, but also no regrets.

90001.name: A Fleeting Glimpse
90001.description: For a moment, you seemed to catch a glimmer of light behind the world's curtain.

90002.name: Whispers of Old Things
90002.description: You heard your old family possessions whispering late at night, but by dawn everything was normal.

90003.name: Psychic Scholar
90003.description: You tried to explain the inexplicable with reason, filling notebooks with half-understood symbols.

90004.name: Ember Scavenger
90004.description: You gradually got used to those uncanny moments, even started looking forward to the next.

90005.name: Ghostly Romance
90005.description: You fell in love with a presence that seemed neither here nor there. Your friends said you were losing it.

90006.name: Iron Will
90006.description: Your life was a solid block of iron—nothing strange ever happened. Maybe that's the strangest thing of all.

90007.name: Shooting Star
90007.description: Your story ended almost as soon as it began.

90008.name: Forged Heart, Sharpened Blade
90008.description: You carved a path through a sea of exams and became the golden child every parent envied.

90009.name: Worldly Riches
90009.description: You made more than enough money, but discovered some things can never be bought.

90010.name: The Lone Wanderer
90010.description: You never stepped into anyone's cage of wedlock, and watched the scenery alone.

90011.name: Sickly but Long-lived
90011.description: You were frail and sickly as a child, yet outlived many healthier people.

90012.name: Heard the Truth at Dawn
90012.description: After witnessing the truth, you faded away without a sound.

90013.name: The Chosen One
90013.description: You always escaped danger at the last moment, as if fate itself was on your side.

90014.name: Psychic Awakening
90014.description: One midnight, you realized you could understand the conversations of stray cats.

90015.name: All Glories Fade
90015.description: You sat on the mountaintop and hit rock bottom, and ended up sipping tea calmly in a small cottage.

90016.name: School Urban Legend
90016.description: After evening study, you saw chalk writing on the blackboard by itself in an empty classroom.

90017.name: Overtime Sighting
90017.description: Working late, you noticed your shadow wasn't moving with you.

90018.name: Deathbed Vision
90018.description: On your deathbed, you saw all the departed loved ones standing beside you, their expressions peaceful.

90019.name: The Veil Torn
90019.description: That day, you finally knew for sure: something was wrong with this world.

90020.name: Ordinary Life
90020.description: You lived an ordinary life—nothing special, no miracles. Sometimes you recall the quiet reflection in your teacup, like another world.

90021.name: A Flicker of Light
90021.description: Late one night working overtime, you saw the office plant sway without wind. When you turned back, it was just an ordinary rubber tree.

90022.name: Mana's Favor
90022.description: A stone appeared in your drawer that you can never lose. You stay dry walking home in the rain. The neighbor's cat always sits upright when it sees you.

90023.name: Longevity Star
90023.description: You outlived most people; your birthday cake requires a fire permit for all the candles. But you still hate to blow them out.

90024.name: Peak Beauty
90024.description: Your high school graduation photo was displayed in a studio window. Years later, classmates still say, "You should have been a star."

90025.name: Genius Student
90025.description: You solve math problems like a game; teachers whisper if you secretly used mana embers on your studies.

90026.name: Iron Body
90026.description: You brave rainstorms, pull all-nighters, eat street food, yet your medical report is better than a fitness trainer's. The doctor frowns and mutters, "Metabolic anomaly."

90027.name: Wealthy
90027.description: You never worried about money. As a child, you thought all kids had their own pool; as an adult, you realized it's true.

90028.name: Happy Poor
90028.description: You live in a cramped studio and eat instant noodles, but when you play harmonica on the rooftop at dusk, the whole building's worries seem to fade.

90029.name: Fortune's Favorite
90029.description: Your life feels orchestrated; every door opens for you, even aging becomes graceful—someone winks at you in the mirror.
90029.condition: HCHR >= 8 AND HINT >= 8 AND HSTR >= 8 AND HMNY >= 8 AND HSPR >= 8 AND HAGE >= 80

90030.name: Blessed Mediocrity
90030.description: You lived past eighty without encountering any supernatural phenomena. Ordinary is fine.

90031.name: Early Death
90031.description: You left before truly seeing the world.

90032.name: Top Student
90032.description: Your mind is sharp as if cheating; always top three in exams; while others cram, you sleep.

90033.name: Stunning Beauty
90033.description: With such looks, people want to spend money on you just walking down the street.

90034.name: Mana-Proof
90034.description: Lived all these years without sensing any mana. Guess you're just not meant for the mystical.

90035.name: A Different World
90035.description: Twice you seemed to see the world's hidden layer; after waking, you smiled for a long time.

90036.name: Weak Body, Strong Will
90036.description: Grew up on medicine; everyone thought you wouldn't last long, but you made it past your eightieth birthday.

90037.name: Sad Old Age
90037.description: Lived a long life, but the light inside went out long ago.

90038.name: Embers at Last
90038.description: One unremarkable afternoon, a pure spark of mana leapt from your fingertip—so the world still has embers after all.

90039.name: Mortal Life
90039.description: Lived peacefully to sixty without seeing anything strange; that's a blessing.

90040.name: Longevity
90040.description: You lived past ninety, outlasting your peers and becoming the family's elder.

90041.name: Brilliant Mind
90041.description: Your IQ crushed everyone else's. From childhood, you were the golden child everyone's parents compared you to.

90042.name: Stunning Looks
90042.description: You were so good-looking people kept sneaking glances at you on the street. You could have lived off your face.

90043.name: Born Rich
90043.description: Choosing your parents is a skill. Your family was well-off, and you never worried about money your whole life.

90044.name: Optimist
90044.description: You were cheerful all day long, as if happiness was free candy.

90045.name: Lonely Heart
90045.description: You felt lonely inside. Happiness never seemed to last. You walked most of life's path alone.

90046.name: Reincarnation Veteran
90046.description: You've restarted your life in this archive over and over. This is your tenth time, like flipping through an old photo album.

90047.name: Glimpse of Something
90047.description: One night, you saw your shadow didn't follow you under the streetlight. You rubbed your eyes and thought it was a hallucination.

90048.name: Aura-Infused
90048.description: You've gotten used to occasionally seeing things others can't see. You can't tell real from illusion, and sometimes you even want to reach out and touch them.

90049.name: First Glimpse of Embers
90049.description: Late one night at work, you saw a faint glow on a can of iced coffee at the convenience store. It vanished instantly. You stood there for a few seconds, then paid and left, going back to your desk to edit a PPT.

90050.name: Psychic Survivor
90050.description: That night, the whispers in the subway tunnel made your skin crawl. You sprinted out of the station. The next day, you went to work as usual—but you never took the last train again.

90051.name: Truth of Housing Prices
90051.description: One afternoon while house-hunting, you suddenly 'saw' something buried under the foundation. You kept a poker face while bargaining with the agent and got an unbelievable discount.

90052.name: Overtime Trance
90052.description: After three days straight of working, you glimpsed floating runes in the air. You jotted one down on a sticky note, then collapsed onto your desk and fell asleep. You woke up remembering nothing.

90053.name: Loved Once
90053.description: You once cooked her a bowl of noodles late at night. And when moving, you found a note she'd left behind. Those moments felt more real than any aura.

90054.name: Embers Researcher
90054.description: You spent your whole life studying the residual embers of magic, publishing countless papers, yet growing more uncertain about what you were really searching for.

90055.name: Urban Legend
90055.description: After that, every party they asked you to tell that story. You learned to pause at the right moments, savoring the audience's screams.

90056.name: Hospice Care
90056.description: The nurse said you smiled in your final moments. No one knew who you saw coming for you at that moment.

90057.name: Mortal Ascension
90057.description: That day, you went for your usual morning run—but never returned to the ground. The neighbors called the police. Only you knew you had simply gone to a higher place.
